texto: I like a bohemian floral dress, but then I'll throw on a leather jacket or a pair of lace-up boots to give it an edge. My mom is always trying to get me to wear really sweet clothes. Something pink. But that's not really my look.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Margaret Qualley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “I like a bohemian floral dress, but then I'll throw on a leather jacket or a pair of lace-up boot…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, dress, pink pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de pink e me.
